title: Business Development
description:
The ideas, initiatives and activities aimed towards making a business better. (Investopedia)

https://www.investopedia.com/articles/personal-finance/090815/basics-business-development.asp


Business development encompasses a range of activities, strategies, and initiatives aimed at improving and growing a business. This typically involves identifying and creating new business opportunities, building and maintaining relationships with partners and clients, and expanding the market presence.
